allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process EXCEL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process EXCEL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-Process EXCEL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process EXCEL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, MainWindowTitle")
